text:
There once was an old cat named Mr. Whiskers. One day, Mr. Whiskers sat on a porch swing when he noticed a giant owl looking at him with big empty eyes. Mr. Whiskers thought the owl seemed lonely.

"Why so sad?" Mr. Whiskers asked. "Are you lost?"

"Yes..." said the owl softly.

With that encouragement, Mr. Whiskers decided to have a little conversation. "Well," he said slowly, "I'm Mr. Whiskers! I've got no enemies here. What's your name?"

"I've forgotten!" the owl exclaimed.

"Forget? You've got a beautiful voice! I have a beautiful garden. Would you sing me something?"


Well, why not? I'd sing you the lullaby I got from my daddy when I was five. What do you think?"


Great! Mr. Whiskers sang a beautiful song. The owl closed his eyes and sang along.<|endoftext|>
